_comment:
Action triggers — phrase-driven expert dispatch. The chat dispatcher consults this file BEFORE exact-prompt match, so a trigger fires even for prompts that aren't trained. Each trigger routes to an `expert_slug` (a TrainedModel slug) with a payload extracted from the user's input.

Fields:
  phrase           — substring to match (case-insensitive)
  expert_slug      — the TrainedModel/QRPair-deployed slug to invoke
  payload_extract  — after-phrase | before-phrase | full-prompt | fixed
  payload_literal  — used only when payload_extract='fixed'
  n_tokens         — override max generated tokens (default = chat's n)
  n_blocks         — override caformer block depth (default = pair's value)
  priority         — higher wins on overlap (default 0)
  enabled          — set false to disable without deleting

Edit this file freely; it's re-read on every request. No server restart needed.

triggers.description: Demo: 'please say hi to me' → invokes the hi→hello pair with canonical payload 'hi' → returns 'hello'. Shows the trigger pattern; replace with real triggers as you train more experts.
